name: Crocin Advance
desc: Effective pain relief and fever reduction. Suitable for adults and children above 12 years.

name: Disprin Regular
desc: Fast relief from headache, toothache, and mild fever. Avoid combining with Ibuprofen.

name: Amoxil 500
desc: Broad-spectrum antibiotic for bacterial infections. Take the full course as prescribed.

desc: Macrolide antibiotic for respiratory, ear, and skin infections.

name: Ciplox 500
desc: Fluoroquinolone antibiotic for urinary tract and gastrointestinal infections.

name: Flagyl 400
desc: Effective against anaerobic bacteria and protozoa infections. Avoid alcohol.

name: Pantocid 40
desc: Proton pump inhibitor for GERD, peptic ulcers and chronic acid reflux.

name: Omez 20
desc: Reduces stomach acid production. Relieves heartburn and indigestion effectively.

name: Rantac 150
desc: H2 receptor blocker for acid reflux and peptic ulcer disease.

name: Digene Gel
desc: Fast-acting antacid gel for immediate relief from acidity and bloating.

name: Cetirizine 10
desc: Non-drowsy antihistamine for allergic rhinitis and urticaria. Effective for 24 hours.

name: Allegra 120
desc: 24-hour allergy relief with no sedation. Ideal for seasonal allergic rhinitis.

name: Claritine 10
desc: Long-acting antihistamine for allergy symptoms and chronic urticaria.

name: Limcee 500
desc: Chewable Vitamin C tablet for immune system support and antioxidant protection.

name: D-Rise 60K

name: Neurobion Forte
desc: Comprehensive B vitamins for nerve health, energy metabolism, and red blood cell production.

name: Revital H

name: Lipitor 20
desc: Statin medication for lowering LDL cholesterol and reducing cardiovascular disease risk.

name: Norvasc 5
desc: Calcium channel blocker for hypertension and stable angina management.

name: Betaloc 50
desc: Beta-blocker for high blood pressure, chronic heart failure, and angina.

name: Glucophage 500

name: Glynase 5
